arts.ttl: Milan Step Up Pursuit of Feyenoord’s Gimenez Amidst Saudi Interest
arts.sum: AC Milan are ramping up negotiations with Feyenoord for striker Santiago Gimenez as the January transfer window approaches its final week. The Rossoneri are eager to secure the talented forward, but face challenges as Feyenoord seeks to retain him for an important upcoming match. The post Milan Step Up Pursuit of Feyenoord’s Gimenez Amidst Saudi Interest appeared first on FootItalia.com.
